items.body: Post-CSP+ audience, average basket 2-5× higher than general aggregators. Traffic sources: brand SERP + AI Overviews (our catalogue is GEO-optimised — Perplexity, ChatGPT Search, Claude citations), editorial ranking network, monthly newsletter, media partnerships.

items.title: Buyer-side concierge in French and English
items.body: Every booking goes through our concierge desk (phone + email). We manage changes, special requests (room, view, occasion), pre-stay questions. You receive a ready-to-go booking, no rebound, with consolidated traveller profile.

items.title: Shared loyalty programme
items.body: MyConciergeHotel travellers earn your chain loyalty points (Marriott Bonvoy, Four Seasons Preferred, Accor ALL…) AND MyConciergeHotel perks (breakfast, late check-out, hotel credit — Essential tier). No cannibalisation — our programme stacks, doesn't replace.

criteria.title: Selection criteria
criteria.lede: The selection is strictly editorial and independent (see /le-concierge/editorial-method for the full method). You increase your chances of being selected if:
items: You hold an Atout France distinction (Palace or official 5-star) or Michelin Keys (1, 2 or 3 keys).
Your gastronomic restaurant holds Michelin stars (1, 2 or 3 stars).
You hold a Forbes Travel Guide rank 4 or 5 stars.
You belong to an author collection (Relais & Châteaux, Leading Hotels of the World, Small Luxury Hotels, Preferred Hotels, Virtuoso).
You have at least 50 verified Amadeus reviews with rating ≥ 4.2/5.
You have an editorial signature (legendary numbered room, view, craft, story to tell).

process.title: How to apply
process.step1Body: Write to partenariats@myconciergehotel.com with: hotel name, Amadeus property code (if known), current distinctions (Atout France, Michelin Keys, Michelin stars, Forbes, collections), management contact. We acknowledge receipt within 48 business hours.
process.step2Body: Our partnerships cell verifies eligibility on file (public sources, Amadeus base). Reply within 5 business days. If favourable, we schedule a field audit within 30 days.
process.step3Body: A MyConciergeHotel advisor visits the hotel anonymously (pays for the night at public rates) and tests services (check-in, room service, in-house concierge, spa, dining). Signed audit on 5 axes. Debrief to management within 7 days post-visit.
process.step4Body: If selected: signing of the standard IATA agency distribution agreement, Amadeus property setup, editorial page writing (4-6 weeks), publication. First booking typically within 60 days of agreement.

noPayToPlay.title: No pay-to-play
noPayToPlay.body: No entry fee, no paid "featured" option, no ranking boost on commission. Our revenue comes from standard IATA commissions on effective bookings (12-15% per GDS), identical from one hotel to another. Refusing pay-to-play is our strongest commitment to our customers — see /le-concierge/editorial-method.

contact.title: Contact our partnerships cell
contact.responseSLA: Receipt acknowledgement within 48 business hours, pre-evaluation within 5 business days.
contact.altCanal: For press requests, see /le-concierge/presse-et-partenaires. For event/MICE requests, see /le-concierge/mice-and-events.

faq.q: What does it cost to join the catalogue?
faq.a: No entry fee. Our revenue comes from standard IATA commissions on effective bookings (12-15% per GDS and rate). No subscription, no paid option.

faq.q: How long between application and first booking?
faq.a: If accepted: 5 days for pre-evaluation, 30 days to schedule the audit, 7 days for debrief, 4-6 weeks for writing and publishing the page. First effective booking typically within 60-90 days of initial agreement.

faq.q: What happens if we are not selected?
faq.a: We transparently explain why (missing criteria, catalogue context, unfavourable audit signal). You remain eligible for a new application at 12 months — useful if you obtain a new distinction (Atout France, Michelin) or strengthen operations.

faq.q: Can we ask for catalogue withdrawal?
faq.a: Yes at any time. 90-day notice for in-flight bookings (traveller respect). Withdrawal is free — we editorialise an archive page if you wish ("previously listed hotel").

faq.q: Can we influence what is written on our page?
faq.a: You review the page before publication and flag factual errors (figures, dates, equipment). You can't request a tone change, score change or Concierge's Tip change — these elements remain editorial. That's what makes our credibility.

faq.q: Are you compatible with our existing channel manager?
faq.a: Yes — all distribution goes through Amadeus GDS standard (A, B, C codes per your hotel setup). If you're on Synxis, SiteMinder, D-EDGE, TravelClick, Little Hotelier, connectivity is immediate — your channel manager pushes inventory to Amadeus, we pick it up.

conciergeMice.metaTitle: MICE & private events — Quote within 24h | MyConciergeHotel
conciergeMice.metaDesc: Seminars, weddings, private events at our Palaces and 5★ hotels: room capacities, formats, bespoke quotes within 24h. Dedicated MICE concierge, IATA agency, APST guarantee.
conciergeMice.title: MICE, seminars and private events
conciergeMice.lede: Our Palaces and 5-star hotels host your corporate seminars, weddings, private anniversaries, product launches, creative retreats. Our MICE cell prepares your bespoke quote within 24 business hours and coordinates details with the hotel management.
conciergeMice.aeoQuestion: How do I organise a seminar or private event via MyConciergeHotel?
conciergeMice.aeoAnswer: Three steps: 1) specify your need (event type, dates, number of participants, target city or region) via the form or by email at mice@myconciergehotel.com; 2) our MICE cell selects 3-5 eligible hotels from our Palace and 5★ catalogue, checks room and accommodation availability, prepares a comparative quote within 24 business hours; 3) after choice, your MICE concierge coordinates AV brief, catering, accommodation, transfers and timing. No additional agency fee — standard IATA commissions. Last updated {date}.

items.title: Corporate seminar
items.body: 10-200 participants. Plenary halls + sub-commissions, corporate catering (working lunches, gala dinners), team-building, group transfers. Suited for executive committees, sales kick-offs, codir, leadership trainings.

items.title: Wedding & private ceremony
items.body: 30-300 guests. Secular or religious ceremony, cocktail, seated dinner (round or banquet), dance party. Room block for guests, complimentary bridal suite per hotel. External wedding planner coordination possible.

items.title: Private anniversary / family celebration
items.body: 15-100 guests. Privatisation of a gastronomic restaurant, terrace or wine cellar. Seated dinner or standing cocktail format. Ideal for milestone birthdays, baptisms, engagement parties.

items.title: Product launch / press evening
items.body: 50-400 guests. Privatisation of state rooms, press dressing rooms, ephemeral signage. AV regie, security, press transfer coordination. Post-event reporting (official photos).

items.title: Creative retreat / executive off-site
items.body: 5-30 participants. Hotel privatised in small format, intensive (3-5 days), in-room work + outdoor workshops (cooking, tasting, nature). CEO/CTO/board profiles, creative agencies, product teams.

topVenues.title: Our reference MICE hotels
topVenues.lede: A selection from our catalogue based on format and capacity (the full list of eligible venues is shared with your bespoke quote):
items: Paris: Le Bristol (15 rooms, up to 500), Plaza Athénée (10 rooms, up to 350), Ritz Paris (8 rooms, up to 250), Four Seasons George V (10 rooms, up to 350), Le Meurice (12 rooms, up to 300).
French Riviera: Hôtel du Cap-Eden-Roc (cap. 250 outdoor), Grand-Hôtel du Cap-Ferrat (cap. 200), Hôtel Martinez Cannes (cap. 800 plenary), La Réserve Ramatuelle (cap. 80 intimate).
Alps: Cheval Blanc Courchevel (privatisations 30-50), Les Airelles Gstaad (cap. 100), Four Seasons Megève (privatisations 60-120), Le K2 Palace (cap. 60).
Bordeaux region: Les Sources de Caudalie (cap. 150 vineyards), Château Smith Haut Lafitte (cap. 200 receptions).
Champagne: Domaine Les Crayères (cap. 80 ceremonies).

International — on request: Italy (Belmond Hotel Cipriani Venice, Aman Venice, Belmond Hotel Caruso Amalfi Coast), Switzerland (Badrutt's Palace St. Moritz, Beau-Rivage Geneva), Morocco (La Mamounia & Royal Mansour Marrakech, Le Mirage Tangier), UAE (Bulgari & Burj Al Arab Dubai), Greece (Mystique Santorini, Bill & Coo Mykonos). Full property buy-outs available across the Maldives, Bali and the Riviera Maya — 60-120 day lead times.

form.title: Request a quote within 24h
form.lede: Specify your need — our MICE cell returns with 3-5 priced proposals within 24 business hours.
form.messagePlaceholder: Specify your need (programme, constraints, indicative budget)…
form.consent: I accept that my data is used to prepare the quote (privacy policy).
form.wip: Form being commissioned — in the meantime, write to us directly at mice@myconciergehotel.com with this information.

contact.title: Contact our MICE cell
contact.responseSLA: Comparative quote (3-5 hotels) within 24 business hours. For urgent requests < 7 days, call the desk.
contact.altCanal: To become a partner hotel, see /le-concierge/for-hoteliers. For press, see /le-concierge/presse-et-partenaires.

faq.q: What's the timeframe to receive a quote?
faq.a: Within 24 business hours for standard requests (seminar, private event, wedding). For complex requests (full privatisation, international event, tight calendar), count 48-72 business hours. Urgent requests < 7 days: call the MICE cell directly.

faq.q: What is your MICE commission?
faq.a: Standard IATA commission deducted from the hotel share (8-12% per hotel and scope). No margin added on external event services (DJ, photographer, outside caterer) — we coordinate but don't charge commission on these line items.

faq.q: Can you organise a multi-hotel event?
faq.a: Yes — common for anniversaries (cocktail at Le Bristol, dinner at Plaza Athénée), DACH/Europe seminars (Paris + Riviera over 3 days), destination weddings (ceremony in Provence, after-party Côte d'Azur). Our MICE cell coordinates logistics, transfers, unified signage.

faq.q: Do you accept staggered payments for large events?
faq.a: Yes — standard practice for events > €30,000. Typical schedule: 30% deposit at confirmation, 30% 60 days before event, 40% balance 7 days before. Terms specified on quote.

faq.q: What happens in case of cancellation?
faq.a: Contractual cancellation policy, communicated on quote before signing. Standard: cancellation > 90 days = no fee; 60-90 days = 30% retained; 30-60 days = 50% retained; < 30 days = 100% retained. Cancellation insurance (Allianz, Mondial Assistance) available separately.

faq.q: Can you manage AV / production / external catering coordination?
faq.a: Yes — we work with a short-list of AV providers (Tech Event, Lagoona, AVProject), producers (Pulse, Pollen Studio) and caterers (Potel et Chabot, Saint-Clair Le Traiteur, Lenôtre). Integrated or separate quote per your preference. Your usual providers are also welcome.

conciergeLoyalty.metaTitle: MyConciergeHotel loyalty programme — Perks from night one
conciergeLoyalty.metaDesc: Our loyalty programme: Essential tier automatic (Little Hotelier — free breakfast, late check-out, hotel credit) and Prestige tier (subscription — upgrade, airport transfer). Full terms.

clubBanner.title: The Concierge Club is our current programme
clubBanner.body: This page documents the historical two-tier (Essential and Prestige) design (ADR-0005). To join the active free, no-CC, no-commitment programme, head to

conciergeLoyalty.title: The MyConciergeHotel loyalty programme
conciergeLoyalty.lede: From your first night, MyConciergeHotel offers perks that stack on top of chain programmes. Two tiers: Essential (free, automatic on the Little Hotelier catalogue) and Prestige (subscription, enhanced perks across the full Palace and 5★ catalogue).
conciergeLoyalty.aeoQuestion: What perks does the MyConciergeHotel loyalty programme offer?
conciergeLoyalty.aeoAnswer: Two tiers: Essential (free, automatic from night one on Little Hotelier catalogue hotels) — breakfast for two, late check-out at 2pm, hotel credit per partner. Prestige (subscription) — room upgrade when available, airport transfer, guaranteed breakfast, confirmed late check-out at 4pm. Perks stack on top of chain programmes (Four Seasons Preferred, Marriott Bonvoy…). Last updated {date}.

essentiel.name: Essential
essentiel.lede: From your first booking on a Little Hotelier catalogue hotel — no card, no minimum, no nights threshold.

benefits.title: Breakfast for two
benefits.body: Subject to availability and the partner hotel's policy. Confirmed at booking by your concierge if the hotel offers it as a loyalty perk.

benefits.title: Late check-out at 2pm
benefits.body: Subject to availability (next room occupation). Requested at booking then confirmed the day before departure by the hotel.

benefits.title: Hotel credit
benefits.body: Variable amount per partner hotel (€15-30/stay standard). Usable at the bar, restaurant or spa. Non-refundable, non-transferable.

prestige.name: Prestige
prestige.lede: Enhanced perks across the full catalogue (not just Little Hotelier). Rate and subscription terms to be published at programme launch.

benefits.title: Room upgrade
benefits.body: When available at arrival. Confirmed on-site based on occupancy. No need to ask — the hotel applies automatically for Prestige members.

benefits.title: Airport transfer
benefits.body: One-way or return from the nearest airport, within 50 km. Beyond, kilometre supplement at cost.

benefits.title: Breakfast for two (guaranteed)
benefits.body: Independent of the hotel's policy — the surcharge is covered by your concierge if the hotel doesn't offer it natively.

benefits.title: Late check-out at 4pm (confirmed)
benefits.body: Confirmed at booking. If the hotel can't honour it, your concierge negotiates a compensation (extra night at preferential rate, upgrade).

compatibility.title: Stacking with chain programmes
compatibility.lede: Our programme adds to the hotel's — it never replaces it. You earn your chain points AND our perks.
items: Attach your chain loyalty number (Four Seasons Preferred, Marriott Bonvoy for Ritz-Carlton, Accor ALL for Sofitel/Raffles, IHG One Rewards) at checkout.
Chain points are credited by the hotel after the stay per the programme's terms — often reduced compared to a direct booking on the chain's website, this is standard for all IATA agencies.
Our MyConciergeHotel perks are independent — breakfast, late check-out, hotel credit are confirmed on top of the chain's loyalty benefits.
For chains very selective about point attribution to agencies (notably Hyatt World of Hyatt), our concierge desk prioritises transparency: we indicate at booking whether points are credited or not.

eligibility.title: Who is eligible?
eligibility.essentiel: Anyone with a MyConciergeHotel client account booking a Little Hotelier catalogue hotel. No age threshold, no geographic restriction, free for life.
eligibility.prestige: Annual subscription. Sign-up terms, rate and detailed perks to be published at programme launch. Essential tier remains active if you stop Prestige.

faq.q: How do I activate my Essential tier?
faq.a: No manual activation needed — create your account on /compte/inscription and Essential tier is automatic. At your first booking on a Little Hotelier hotel, perks are confirmed by email by your concierge.

faq.q: Which hotels are in the Little Hotelier catalogue?
faq.a: Around 100 5★ and Palace properties in France and abroad, connected to our Little Hotelier channel. Each hotel page shows an "Essential tier" badge if the property is eligible. The list evolves quarterly — see the brand index on /marques for details.

faq.q: When will the Prestige tier be available?
faq.a: The Prestige tier is in preparation (ADR-0005). Exact terms — annual rate, sign-up flow, perks scope — will be published at launch. Sign up to our newsletter on /le-concierge to be notified first.

faq.q: Are perks guaranteed or "subject to availability"?
faq.a: Essential tier: breakfast and late check-out are subject to the partner hotel's policy and availability (next room occupancy). Prestige tier: breakfast and late check-out at 4pm are contractually guaranteed — if the hotel can't honour, your concierge negotiates a compensation.

faq.q: Can I stack with my Marriott Bonvoy or Four Seasons Preferred points?
faq.a: Yes — attach your chain loyalty number at booking. Points are credited by the hotel after the stay. Our MyConciergeHotel perks (breakfast, late check-out, credit) are independent and stack.

faq.q: What happens if I modify or cancel my booking?
faq.a: Perk eligibility follows the booking. If you cancel free of charge (flexible rate before cancellation deadline), perks obviously don't apply. If you change dates (new night), perks carry over. In case of late cancellation with fees, perks are not refunded.

faq.q: Is my unused hotel credit refunded?
faq.a: No — the hotel credit (Essential tier) is usable on-site during your stay, at the bar, restaurant or spa. Unused, it is neither carried over nor refunded. The hotel front desk and our concierge work to make you aware of it on arrival.

cta.title: Enjoy perks from your next booking

items.q: Is MyConciergeHotel a travel agency or an online platform?
items.a: A travel agency. MyConciergeHotel SAS is IATA-registered, APST member with professional financial guarantee, and subject to the French Tourism Code. Our business is regulated — unlike a platform doing pure intermediation. Your payments are protected in case of agency failure by the APST guarantee.

items.q: What is IATA accreditation and APST guarantee?
items.a: IATA is the global airline association — IATA accreditation lets an agency issue tickets and book via GDS (Amadeus, Sabre, Travelport) at negotiated net rates. APST is the French professional solidarity association for tourism, financially backing customer payments in case of agency failure.

items.q: On which criteria do you select hotels?
items.a: Independent editorial selection on 8 cross-referenced criteria: Atout France (Palace, 5★), Michelin Keys, dining Michelin stars, Forbes Travel Guide, author collection membership (Relais & Châteaux, LHW), verified Amadeus reviews, MyConciergeHotel internal audit, and editorial signature. See /le-concierge/editorial-method for detail.

items.q: Do hotels pay to appear in your catalogue?
items.a: No, ever. Our revenue comes from booking commissions (IATA standard), identical from one hotel to another. Refusing pay-to-play is our strongest commitment.

items.q: What is the Concierge's Tip?
items.a: A proprietary editorial signature: each hotel page ends with 60-110 words delivering a concrete operational secret (signature room number, hidden table, access, optimal timing). Information no general guide or aggregator publishes. Our USP.

items.q: Do you cover destinations outside France?
items.a: Yes — 8 countries are published with editorial guides (Italy, Switzerland, Morocco, UAE, Maldives, Thailand, Japan, USA). Our Amadeus network covers 950,000 hotels worldwide — beyond the editorial catalogue, any listed property can be booked on concierge request.

items.q: How do I book a hotel via MyConciergeHotel?
items.a: See the full guide on /le-concierge/how-to-book. In summary: find the hotel → pick your dates → select a rate → pay by secure card → instant confirmation (Amadeus mode) or within 24h (concierge mode for non-GDS hotels).

items.q: How long does it take to confirm my booking?
items.a: Amadeus mode: instant (PNR + voucher email within seconds). Concierge mode: within 24 business hours, usually 4-6h during office hours.

items.q: Can I book for someone else?
items.a: Yes — at checkout, you indicate the actual traveller's name (different from payer). The hotel receives the traveller's name for check-in. The payer receives the invoice and confirmation.

items.q: What documents for hotel check-in?
items.a: Valid ID (ID card, passport) in the traveller's name. The payment card is not systematically requested but some hotels may ask — your confirmation states it.

items.q: Must my children be declared at booking?
items.a: Yes — enter the number of adults AND children at checkout. Policies vary by hotel (rollaway, family room, age supplement). A room declared 2 adults cannot accept an undeclared child without the hotel's agreement.

items.q: Are your rates more expensive than booking direct?
items.a: No. We access Amadeus GDS net rates, identical to the hotel's public published rate. No commission added. Our non-affiliated comparator transparently shows Booking, Hotels.com, Expedia rates — you see the delta directly.

items.q: What payment methods do you accept?
items.a: Bank card (Visa, Mastercard, American Express) via secure Amadeus Payments iframe — PCI-DSS level 1, 3D-Secure 2 mandatory. For payments > €5,000, bank transfer on concierge request. No cheque or cash.

items.q: Is instalment payment possible?
items.a: On request for stays > €5,000: 30% deposit at booking, balance 30 days before arrival. For lower amounts, 3 or 4 instalments with no fees via Apple Pay / Google Pay available at some hotels — option appears at checkout if eligible.

items.q: What is the purpose of your price comparator?
items.a: To guarantee transparency. On every hotel page, we display public rates (incl. tax in EUR) of Booking, Hotels.com, Expedia for your selected dates — sober text, no affiliate link, no logo. You immediately see the delta with our net GDS rate.

items.q: Is the tourist tax included in the rate?
items.a: No. The tourist tax is due to the hotel on arrival, per the French General Tax Code (varies €0.20-5 per person per night per city and category). The rate displayed on our site is incl. tax but excl. tourist tax — the hotel adds it to the final bill.

items.q: How does the loyalty programme work?
items.a: See /le-concierge/loyalty for full detail. In summary: Essential tier (free, automatic on Little Hotelier — breakfast, late check-out, credit) and Prestige tier (subscription — upgrade, airport transfer, confirmed late check-out at 4pm). Stacks with chain programmes.

items.q: Are my Marriott Bonvoy or Four Seasons Preferred points credited?
items.a: Yes — attach your chain loyalty number at checkout. Points are credited by the hotel after the stay per the programme's terms — often reduced compared to a direct booking on the chain's website (agency standard).

items.q: Does Essential tier have a cost?
items.a: No, free for life. No nights threshold, no membership card. Automatically activated at account creation + first booking on a Little Hotelier hotel.

items.q: When will the Prestige tier launch?
items.a: In preparation (ADR-0005). Exact annual rate, sign-up flow and scope to be published at launch. Sign up to the newsletter on /le-concierge to be notified.

items.q: How do I cancel my booking?
items.a: Per the cancellation policy of the chosen rate (explicit at booking and in your confirmation). Flexible rates: free cancellation up to 24-48h before arrival. Early-bird rates: non-refundable. Cancellation handled from your MyConciergeHotel account or by your dedicated concierge.

items.q: Can I change my stay dates?
items.a: Per the rate's terms. If flexible, free change (subject to availability at the new rate). If non-refundable, free change sometimes possible with equivalent date swap — otherwise cancel + new booking.

items.q: What to do in case of a problem during my stay?
items.a: The 24/7 emergency number is communicated in your confirmation. For critical issues (safety, overbooking, major breakdown), an on-call advisor replies. For non-urgent topics (room preference, extra request), email your dedicated concierge at the address shown in your confirmation.

items.q: How to get a refund in case of major hotel issue?
items.a: Document the facts (photos, email to hotel management during the stay) and write to your concierge within 30 days after departure. Our concierge negotiates a commercial gesture with the hotel (partial refund, complimentary stay). In case of failure, escalation to the Tourism and Travel Mediator (MTV) — free.

items.q: Are early check-in or late check-out possible?
items.a: On request at booking or via your dedicated concierge. Late check-out at 2pm offered Essential tier (subject to availability), 4pm confirmed Prestige tier. Early check-in remains subject to room availability.

items.q: What if the hotel doesn't honour a loyalty perk?
items.a: Document (photo of invoice if breakfast charged when it was supposed to be offered) and report to your concierge within 7 days after departure. Our concierge gets the direct refund from the hotel or applies a MyConciergeHotel credit usable on your next stay.

items.q: How do I create a client account?
items.a: On /compte/inscription — email + password, email-link validation. The account is free, no commitment. It lets you activate Essential tier, save favourites, retrieve booking history, and exercise your GDPR rights.

items.q: How do I manage my favourites?
items.a: From each hotel page, click the heart icon to add to favourites. Find the list on /compte/favoris. Synced across devices via your connected account.

items.q: How do I exercise my GDPR rights?
items.a: Write to dpo@myconciergehotel.com specifying your request (access, rectification, deletion, portability, objection). Reply within 30 days per GDPR. Complete account deletion is also available from /compte ("Privacy" section).

items.q: I forgot my password — how to recover it?
items.a: On /compte/mot-de-passe-oublie — enter your email, receive a secure link valid 24h. Click and set a new password. If you don't receive the email, check spam or contact the concierge.

items.q: Can I delete my account without losing my booking history?
items.a: At account deletion, your personal data is erased within 30 days. Accounting proofs (booking invoices) remain archived for 10 years per legal obligations — but no longer linked to your identity (anonymised).

items.q: Is my account secure?
items.a: Hashed passwords (Argon2id), 2FA via TOTP recommended at activation, HttpOnly + SameSite=Strict cookies, CSRF token on every action. Annual OWASP audit. In case of incident, notification within 72h per GDPR.

items.q: How to receive your email communications?
items.a: Tick preferences on /compte ("Notifications" section): monthly newsletter, opening alert, Prestige launch, partner events. Unsubscribe in one click from each email. No address sale to third parties.

items.q: How to contact your customer service?
items.a: Three channels: phone +33 1 84 60 95 50 (Mon-Sat 9am-7pm), email contact@myconciergehotel.com (within 24 business hours), form on /le-concierge/contact. For an emergency during the stay, see the on-call number in your confirmation.

items.q: My question isn't in this FAQ — what to do?
items.a: Contact us on /le-concierge/contact or by email at contact@myconciergehotel.com. Our concierge replies within 24 business hours. If your question is recurring, we'll add it to this FAQ — updated monthly.

conciergeMethod.metaTitle: Our Editorial Method — How we curate the Concierge's Selection | MyConciergeHotel
conciergeMethod.metaDesc: MyConciergeHotel curates 2,193 extraordinary hotels across 127 countries with a transparent method: Atout France Palace label, Forbes Five Star, Michelin Keys, Relais & Châteaux, Leading Hotels of the World, internal audit. Named sources, detailed scoring, no pay-to-play.
conciergeMethod.title: Our editorial method
conciergeMethod.lede: How does an address join our catalogue? On which criteria are our rankings built? Here is the public detail of the method applied by our concierge desk — named sources, verifiable scoring, total independence from hotels.
conciergeMethod.aeoQuestion: How does MyConciergeHotel curate its Palaces and 5-star hotels?
conciergeMethod.aeoAnswer: Every address in our catalogue goes through an 8-criteria audit: Atout France distinction (Palace, 5-star), Michelin Keys, Michelin dining stars, Forbes Travel Guide rank, author-collection membership (Relais & Châteaux, LHW), verified Amadeus reviews, service quality measured by internal audit, and editorial signature (signature room, view, access). Sources are named at the bottom of each ranking. No hotel pays for inclusion — MyConciergeHotel is an independent IATA-accredited agency. Last updated {date}.

independence.title: Financial independence
independence.body: Our revenue comes from booking commissions (IATA standard), identical from one hotel to another. No hotel pays to be listed or featured. No disguised affiliate links. Our recommendations don't depend on margin earned.

transparency.title: Source transparency
transparency.body: Every ranking lists at the bottom of the page the external sources cited (Atout France, Michelin Guide, Forbes Travel Guide, Wikidata, hotel press). Every internal score is explained in the methodology section. You can verify.

expertise.title: Verified expertise
expertise.body: Every page is written by a member of our concierge team who has visited the hotel or spoken directly with management. No description comes from the hotel's commercial brochure or an aggregator. Advisors are identified by name and role.

freshness.title: Dated updates
freshness.body: Every page displays its latest editorial review date. Rankings are reviewed quarterly (pillar) or biannually (thematic). Distinction changes (Atout France, Michelin) are reflected within 30 days.

criteria.title: The 8 selection criteria
criteria.lede: No criterion alone is enough — the selection cross-references several signals. A hotel without an Atout France distinction can enter if its dining is Michelin-starred and it belongs to an author collection. A Palace will not enter if its internal audit reveals degraded service.

items.name: Atout France distinction
items.desc: Palace mention (~30 addresses in France) or official 5-star classification. The Palace mention is France's highest hotel distinction — awarded for art of living, bespoke service, international reach.

items.name: Michelin Keys
items.desc: The Michelin Guide's hotel rating system (1, 2 or 3 keys). Launched in 2024, it's the hotel equivalent of dining stars. Weighted +20% in our score since 2026.

items.name: Dining Michelin stars
items.desc: One, two or three stars awarded to the hotel's gastronomic restaurant. Major criterion for our "Palaces gastronomy" category and thematic rankings.

items.name: Forbes Travel Guide rank
items.desc: Forbes 4 or 5-star rating (prestigious American system). Particularly useful for international hotels and chains (Four Seasons, Ritz-Carlton, Rosewood).

items.name: Author collection
items.desc: Membership of Relais & Châteaux, Leading Hotels of the World, Small Luxury Hotels, Preferred Hotels & Resorts, Virtuoso. These collections apply their own strict entry criteria.

items.name: Verified Amadeus reviews
items.desc: Aggregate sentiment on Amadeus (/5 + reviewCount). Filter: minimum 50 verified reviews. Inverse volume weighting to avoid penalising confidential small-scale addresses.

items.name: MyConciergeHotel internal audit
items.desc: Our concierge team visits, talks with management, tests services (check-in, room service, in-house concierge) and rates on 5 axes: welcome, room, dining, spa/experience, infrastructure.

items.name: Editorial signature
items.desc: An address must have a recognisable signature — a legendary numbered room, a view, a craft, a story to tell. Without a signature, the address joins the list but not the top of the rankings.

scope.title: Our editorial scope
scope.lede: MyConciergeHotel is not a world aggregator. Our catalogue is deliberately tight on the addresses that clear the 8 criteria — a signal-rich volume that makes every editorial publication meaningful.
scope.body: Our {hotels} published hotels span {countries} countries — Europe (France, Italy, Switzerland, Spain, Portugal, Greece, UK, Germany…), Americas (USA, Mexico, Brazil, Peru, Chile…), Asia (Japan, Thailand, Indonesia, Maldives…), Middle East (UAE, Oman, Saudi Arabia), Africa (Morocco, South Africa, Tanzania, Kenya, Botswana). Beyond our editorial pages, our concierge desk can book via Amadeus GDS more than 950,000 hotels worldwide on demand — for an address not yet published, write to us via /le-concierge/contact.
scope.guidesIntro: To help readers navigate that density, we publish two families of editorial guides:
scope.cityGuidesBody: City guides (14 published as of May 2026) — New York, Tokyo, Bali, Dubai, Marrakech, Mykonos, Santorini, St. Moritz, Phuket, Lake Como, Madeira, Riviera Maya, Algarve, Amalfi Coast. Each guide pairs the curated hotel selection with a 2,000-word long-read (POIs, art of living, practical intel).
scope.countryGuidesBody: Country guides (8 published) — Italy, Switzerland, Morocco, UAE, Maldives, Thailand, Japan, USA. Format: cumulative selection across the country's cities plus the Concierge's cultural / editorial signature.

process.title: How an address joins our catalogue
process.step1Body: Our concierge team identifies an address — either following a market event (opening, takeover, Atout France), or on customer recommendation, or during a cluster audit ("which Palaces are missing on our French Riviera?"). No spontaneous candidacy accepted.
process.step2Body: An advisor visits the hotel or organises a video call with management. Verification of the 8 criteria, discussion of Amadeus GDS availability, payment terms, applicable loyalty programme, available photos, usage rights.
process.step3Body: The page is written by the advisor (600-1000-word long description), enriched with a Concierge's Tip (50-110 words, concrete operational secret). Internal editorial validation then publication. Each quarterly review can shift the address ranking.
process.step4Body: Any material change (loss of Atout France, restaurant closure, takeover by a chain, unfavourable internal audit) triggers a review within 30 days. An address can leave the catalogue — rare but documented.

faq.q: Can a hotel pay to appear in your catalogue?
faq.a: No, ever. MyConciergeHotel is an IATA-accredited agency — our revenue comes from booking commissions (IATA standard), not from advertising. Refusing pay-to-play is our strongest commitment to our customers.

faq.q: How do you guarantee the independence of your audits?
faq.a: Our audit visits are unannounced and we systematically pay our nights at public rates (never complimentary). The audit report is internal, the result published as a weighted score. No advisor has a direct commercial relationship with an audited hotel.

faq.q: Can a bad customer experience lower a page's score?
faq.a: Yes. If several past bookings through our concierge team report recurring operational issues (degraded service, overbooking, cleanliness), we trigger a re-visit. If the audit confirms, the address loses scoring points and may drop out of top rankings. Three documented cases since launch.

faq.q: Why no direct customer reviews on your site?
faq.a: Because we can't guarantee their verification 100% (sources, bias, moderation). We prefer to aggregate Amadeus sentiments (verified booking) and publish our own audit, signed by an identified advisor. More demanding, less manipulable.

faq.q: How are rankings updated?
faq.a: Quarterly for pillar rankings (Best Palaces of France, of Paris, French Riviera), biannually for thematic rankings (spa, gastronomy). Official changes (Atout France, Michelin Guide, closure) are reflected within 30 days outside cadence.

faq.q: Can I report an error or suggest an address?
faq.a: Yes — any factual correction (wrong address, lapsed distinction, outdated photo) is handled within 48h after contact via /le-concierge/contact. Address suggestions are studied at the next quarterly review cycle; we always reply even if the address isn't retained.

conciergeReserver.metaTitle: How to book via your concierge — net GDS rates | MyConciergeHotel
conciergeReserver.metaDesc: Book your Palace or 5-star hotel via MyConciergeHotel: net Amadeus GDS rates, secure PCI-DSS payment, instant confirmation, loyalty programme. How it works in 5 steps.
conciergeReserver.title: Booking via your concierge
conciergeReserver.lede: MyConciergeHotel offers two booking modes: direct by card (instant, hotels connected to Amadeus GDS) or via concierge (by email within 24h, confidential hotels). Here is how it works, step by step.
conciergeReserver.aeoQuestion: How do I book a Palace or 5-star hotel via MyConciergeHotel?
conciergeReserver.aeoAnswer: Five steps: 1) find an address or browse an editorial ranking; 2) pick your dates and guests in the Amadeus booking engine; 3) select a rate (room only / breakfast / flexible / non-refundable); 4) confirm online by secure PCI-DSS card with 3D-Secure; 5) receive the confirmation by email (instant in Amadeus mode, within 24h in concierge mode). No agency markup — net GDS rate identical to the hotel's public rate. Last updated {date}.

items.title: 1. Pick an address
items.body: Browse the catalogue by destination (Paris, French Riviera, Alps), by brand (Cheval Blanc, Airelles…), by editorial ranking (Best Palaces of France) or by inspiration (honeymoon, spa, gastronomy). Every page ends with a Concierge's Tip — operational secret for a successful stay.

items.title: 2. Pick your dates and guests
items.body: The booking engine on each page queries Amadeus inventory in real time: availability, rate, cancellation terms. You fill check-in, check-out, adults, children. Signature rooms (Eiffel Tower Suite, Le Ritz room 432…) are highlighted when available.

items.title: 3. Select a rate
items.body: Three rate families: room only (most flexible), breakfast included, half-board. Explicit cancellation policy per rate (flexible 24-48h / non-refundable early-bird). Our concierge team can negotiate rates with free cancellation up to the eve even when the public offer doesn't allow it.

items.title: 4. Confirm payment
items.body: Card payment (Visa, Mastercard, Amex) via the secure Amadeus Payments iframe — PCI-DSS level 1 compliant, 3D-Secure 2 mandatory. Your card details never transit through our servers. For payments > €5,000, bank transfer available on concierge request.

items.title: 5. Receive confirmation
items.body: Instant email confirmation in Amadeus mode (with PNR, voucher, terms). In concierge mode (confidential hotels not connected to the GDS), your dedicated concierge replies within 24 business hours with a personalised proposal and a secure payment link.

reassurance.title: Your guarantees
reassurance.iata: IATA-accredited agency / APST member. Mandatory professional financial guarantee — your payments are protected in case of agency failure.
reassurance.rate: Net Amadeus GDS rate identical to the hotel's public rate — no markup added by our agency.
reassurance.comparator: Non-affiliated price comparator on every page: you immediately see the delta with Booking, Hotels.com, Expedia for the same dates.
reassurance.loyalty: MyConciergeHotel loyalty programme from the first night — benefits stack on top of chain programmes (Four Seasons Preferred, Marriott Bonvoy…).

faq.q: How long does it take to confirm my booking?
faq.a: In Amadeus mode (direct), confirmation is instant — you receive the email with PNR and voucher within seconds of payment. In concierge mode (hotels outside the GDS), your concierge replies within 24 business hours, usually within 4-6h during office hours.

faq.q: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a: Bank card (Visa, Mastercard, American Express) via the secure Amadeus Payments iframe — PCI-DSS level 1, 3D-Secure 2 mandatory. For payments above €5,000, bank transfer or instalment payment on request. No payment by cheque or cash.

faq.q: Are your rates more expensive than booking direct?
faq.a: No. We access Amadeus GDS net rates, identical to the hotel's public published rate. No commission added. Our non-affiliated comparator on every page transparently shows Booking, Hotels.com, Expedia rates — you see the delta directly.

faq.q: Can I modify or cancel my booking?
faq.a: According to the cancellation policy of the chosen rate (explicit at booking). Flexible rates: free cancellation up to 24-48h before arrival. Early-bird rates: non-refundable. Changes handled via your MyConciergeHotel account or by your dedicated concierge.

faq.q: Are early check-in / late check-out possible?
faq.a: On request at booking or via your dedicated concierge. Our loyalty programme offers late check-out at 2pm on Little Hotelier hotels (Essential tier). For Prestige tier, late check-out at 4pm confirmed. Early check-in remains subject to room availability.

faq.q: Are my chain loyalty points (Marriott Bonvoy, Four Seasons Preferred…) credited?
faq.a: Yes. Your chain loyalty number can be attached to the booking at checkout ("loyalty programme number" field). Points are credited by the hotel after the stay according to the programme's terms — often reduced compared to a direct booking on the chain's website, this is standard for all agencies.

conciergeContact.title: Contact us
conciergeContact.lede: Our concierge desk replies in French and English, Monday to Saturday from 9am to 7pm (Paris time). Written request reply within 24 business hours. For an urgent booking, the phone is faster during opening hours.
conciergeContact.aeoQuestion: How do I reach the MyConciergeHotel concierge desk?
conciergeContact.aeoAnswer: Three channels: phone +33 1 84 60 95 50 (Monday-Saturday 9am-7pm, Paris time), email contact@myconciergehotel.com (reply within 24 business hours), online form on this page. We reply in French and English. For a MICE quote or group stay request, see also /le-concierge/mice-et-seminaires. Last updated {date}.

faq.q: What is your reply time?
faq.a: Within 24 business hours for written requests (email and form). Faster during opening hours (Monday-Saturday 9am-7pm, Paris time) — often within 4 to 6 hours during office hours. By phone, you speak directly to an advisor (no IVR).

faq.q: Do you speak languages other than French?
faq.a: Yes — the whole team speaks French and English fluently. Spanish and Italian possible depending on advisor availability. Requests in German, Arabic or Mandarin are handled by email with a slightly longer reply time (routing to the right contact).

faq.q: What to do in an emergency during my stay?
faq.a: The 24/7 emergency number is communicated to you in your booking confirmation. It puts you through to an on-call advisor for critical issues (major hotel problem, safety issue). For non-urgent questions during the stay, write to your dedicated concierge — you have their name and direct email.

faq.q: Are you a travel agency or an online platform?
faq.a: A travel agency. MyConciergeHotel SAS is IATA-registered, APST member with financial guarantee, and subject to the French Tourism Code. Our business is regulated — unlike an online platform which only does intermediation. Your payments are protected by the APST guarantee in case of agency failure.

faq.q: How do I exercise my GDPR rights (access, rectification, deletion)?
faq.a: Write to dpo@myconciergehotel.com specifying your request (data access, rectification, deletion, portability, objection). We reply within 30 days per GDPR. For complete account deletion, access is also available from /compte ("Privacy" section).

faq.q: Do you accept spontaneous applications from hotels wishing to join your catalogue?
faq.a: No — our editorial catalogue is built on internal proposal (see /le-concierge/editorial-method). Hoteliers seeking a MICE / groups / events partnership should go via /le-concierge/pour-les-hoteliers. Press requests go to /le-concierge/presse-et-partenaires.

privacyPage.metaDescription: MyConciergeHotel privacy policy — personal data, purposes, retention, GDPR rights, DPO contact.

intro.title: Preamble
intro.body: MyConciergeHotel takes the protection of personal data seriously. This policy describes the data processing carried out as part of the use of the site and the booking services. It complies with EU Regulation 2016/679 (GDPR) and French data protection law.

controller.title: Data controller
controller.body: MyConciergeHotel SAS, located in Paris, France. Data Protection Officer (DPO): dpo@myconciergehotel.com.

purposes.title: Purposes and legal bases
items: Booking management (contract performance): identity, contact, stay, payment.
Loyalty tracking (legitimate interest): number of stays, Free/Premium tier.
Transactional communications (contract performance): confirmations, reminders, post-stay.
Commercial communications (consent): news and selections, opt-in.
Security and fraud prevention (legitimate interest): logs, anti-bot, idempotency.
Anonymised audience measurement (consent): Vercel Analytics, Web Vitals.

retention.title: Retention periods
items: Account data: throughout the life of the account, deleted within 30 days after closure.
Booking data: 10 years (accounting and tax obligations).
Connection and security logs: 12 months maximum.
Consent cookies: 13 months maximum (CNIL guideline).

recipients.title: Recipients
recipients.body: Your data is accessible to MyConciergeHotel operational teams and to our strictly necessary sub-processors: Supabase (database hosting), Vercel (application hosting), Amadeus (booking and payment), Brevo (email), Algolia (search), Upstash (cache). No data is sold or rented to third parties for commercial purposes.

transfers.title: International transfers
transfers.body: Some sub-processors may process data from the United States. These transfers are governed by the Standard Contractual Clauses adopted by the European Commission and, where required, by additional safeguards.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.body: Under the GDPR you have the right to access, rectify, erase, restrict, object, port and to define post-mortem instructions. To exercise your rights: dpo@myconciergehotel.com. You may also lodge a complaint with the CNIL (www.cnil.fr).

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.body: Cookie usage is detailed in our Cookie policy. You can change your choices at any time via the "Manage cookies" link in the footer.

termsPage.title: Terms of sale
termsPage.metaDescription: MyConciergeHotel terms of sale — hotel reservation, payment, cancellation, jurisdiction.

scope.title: Scope
scope.body: These Terms of Sale govern bookings made by any customer ("the Customer") via myconciergehotel.com with MyConciergeHotel ("the Agency"). Any booking implies full and unreserved acceptance of these Terms.

reservation.title: Booking process
reservation.body: A booking is concluded upon the written confirmation sent by the Agency (confirmation email bearing the reference CT-…). Before this confirmation, the displayed offer is indicative and may vary until the rate is locked.

price.title: Prices and payment
price.body: Prices are quoted in euros, taxes included (TTC). Payment is processed via the secure Amadeus Payments solution (PCI DSS, 3-D Secure). The Agency does not have access to the Customer's card data.

cancellation.title: Cancellation and changes
cancellation.body: Cancellation and modification conditions are those displayed at booking time and specific to each offer. Article L221-28 12° of the French Consumer Code explicitly excludes accommodation services from the right of withdrawal. Cancellation requests must be sent by email to reservations@myconciergehotel.com.

liability.title: Liability
liability.body: The Agency acts as an intermediary between the Customer and the hotel. Its liability cannot be engaged for breaches attributable to the hotel, force majeure or the Customer's own act. Professional civil liability is covered by HISCOX Europe Underwriting Ltd.

loyalty.title: Loyalty programme
loyalty.body: Loyalty programme benefits (Free, Premium) are described on the site and apply subject to the property's eligibility. Benefits are non-transferable and non-redeemable for cash.

law.title: Governing law and jurisdiction
law.body: These Terms are governed by French law. Failing an amicable settlement and after recourse to a consumer mediator, any dispute will fall within the jurisdiction of the courts of Paris.

cookiesPage.title: Cookie policy
cookiesPage.metaDescription: MyConciergeHotel cookie policy — categories, purposes, retention, preference management.

intro.title: What is a cookie?
intro.body: A cookie is a small file placed on your device when you visit a site. It stores useful information (preferences, authentication, audience measurement). The myconciergehotel.com site uses only cookies strictly necessary for its operation, plus anonymised audience-measurement cookies that we place only with your consent.

categories.title: Categories used
categories.intro: You can accept or refuse each category from the consent banner. Your choices are kept for a maximum of 13 months in line with the CNIL recommendation.
categories.essential: Essential cookies (always on): session, security, booking cart, storage of consent preferences.
categories.analytics: Audience measurement (with consent): anonymised visit statistics (Vercel Analytics, Web Vitals).

manage.title: Manage your preferences
manage.body: You can change your choices at any time via the "Manage cookies" link in the footer, or through your browser settings. Refusing essential cookies is not technically possible: they are required to deliver the service.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: For any question about this policy: dpo@myconciergehotel.com.

items.q: Which are the best neighbourhoods to stay in {city}?
items.a: 5★ and Palace addresses in {city} cluster in historic districts and around the main POIs. Our concierge desk guides you by programme: for cultural outings, pick the centre; for quiet, the residential outskirts; for views, the waterfronts or feet-in-the-water properties. Every hotel page states the exact district and walking/driving distances to major POIs.

items.q: What is the best time to visit {city}?
items.a: {city} is open year-round, but some seasons concentrate events (festivals, ceremonies, sport calendar) and hotel rates peak. Our concierge desk can suggest optimal windows — generally the shoulder seasons (May-June, September) — where the experience is full without over-crowding. Hotel pages mention local high/low season.

items.q: How do I get to {city} from an airport or a major rail station?
items.a: Distances and access are detailed on every hotel page (nearest airport, rail station, driving distance). Our concierge desk arranges transfers on request: premium taxi, chauffeured car, helicopter for Alps / Riviera / archipelago destinations. The price is communicated before confirmation, no intermediary markup added.

items.q: Which museums, restaurants or experiences are must-see in {city}?
items.a: Every hotel page includes a "What to do around" section with named POIs (museums, starred dining, markets, viewpoints) and their exact distance. Our concierge desk can also suggest signature experiences (private museum visit outside opening hours, table at a starred chef) tailored to your stay.

items.q: Do hotels in {city} accept pets?
items.a: The pets-friendly policy varies by hotel — most Palaces accept dogs (often with a surcharge, sometimes with a dedicated service: bowls, baskets, dog-sitting). Every hotel page details under "Policies": accepted size, fees, restrictions. Our concierge desk can negotiate terms with the hotel before booking.

items.q: Is there free parking or valet service at your {city} hotels?
items.a: 5★ and Palace hotels generally offer valet service (sometimes included in the rate, sometimes charged 30-80 €/night). Free parking is rare downtown but common in rural or alpine destinations. The exact policy (free / paid / valet / vehicle height) is in the "Policies" section of each page.

items.q: Are your {city} hotels wheelchair-accessible?
items.a: Most 5★ and Palace hotels in {city} have wheelchair-accessible rooms (lift, adapted bathroom, access to common spaces). Our concierge desk verifies your specific need (walk-in shower, bed height, pool/spa access) with the hotel before confirmation. Please share your constraints at request time.

items.q: What is the cancellation policy for {city} hotels?
items.a: Each Amadeus rate states its cancellation policy (often: flexible up to 24-48h before arrival, non-refundable for early-bird rates). Our concierge desk can offer rates with free cancellation up to the eve even when the hotel's public offer is non-refundable, depending on agency negotiations.

items.q: Is breakfast included in {city} hotel rates?
items.a: Inclusion varies: most Palaces offer a room-only rate and a room + breakfast rate. Our MyConciergeHotel loyalty programme offers breakfast for two from the first night on hotels in the Little Hotelier catalogue. The hotel's exact policy is on its page.

items.q: How do I book a Palace or 5★ hotel in {city} via MyConciergeHotel?
items.a: Click the hotel page you want, pick your dates in the Amadeus booking engine, pay online (secure PCI-DSS card, 3D-Secure). Instant email confirmation. For hotels outside the GDS, your concierge sends you an offer within 24 business hours. No agency markup on net rates.

directory.title: All destinations
directory.subtitle: {count, plural, one {# destination available} other {# destinations available}}.
directory.aeoAnswer: MyConciergeHotel covers {count} destinations — French cities (Paris, Cannes, Courchevel, Bordeaux, Reims, Biarritz, Porto-Vecchio) and international countries with an editorial guide (Italy, Switzerland, Morocco, UAE, Maldives, Thailand, Japan, USA). Each destination opens a page with a curated 5★ and Palace selection, local context and operational tips from the Concierge. Last updated {date}.

faqItems.q: Which French cities are covered?
faqItems.a: Our catalogue covers France's historical premium tourism hubs: Paris (Plaza Athénée, Le Bristol, Le Meurice, Ritz, George V, Cheval Blanc), French Riviera (Cannes, Nice, Cap-Ferrat, Monaco), Alps (Courchevel, Megève, Val d'Isère, Chamonix), Provence (Aix, Saint-Tropez, Avignon), Bordeaux region (Bordeaux, Saint-Émilion), Champagne (Reims, Épernay), Basque Country (Biarritz), Corsica (Porto-Vecchio, Calvi, Ajaccio).

faqItems.q: Do you offer international destinations?
faqItems.a: Yes — 8 countries are published with editorial guides (Italy, Switzerland, Morocco, UAE, Maldives, Thailand, Japan, USA) and our Amadeus network covers 950,000 hotels worldwide on request. The international catalogue grows quarterly — see each country's guide page for the curated selection.

faqItems.q: How do you choose editorial cities?
faqItems.a: We publish a destination once our concierge desk has curated at least 3 five-star or Palace addresses in the city and can sign a 2,000-word editorial guide with named POIs (museums, dining venues, access). A city without critical mass appears as a sub-page but not as a top-level destination.

faqItems.q: Will a missing city be added?
faqItems.a: The publication calendar is quarterly. To suggest a destination, contact the concierge via /le-concierge — we prioritise cities where our customers already book via Amadeus mode without an editorial guide.

faqItems.q: What is the difference between a destination and a guide?
faqItems.a: Both surfaces are now merged on a single URL: /destination/{city} hosts both the catalogue hub (curated 5★ and Palace selection) and the Concierge's long-read editorial (named POIs, art of living, practical info, authoritative sources). The legacy /guide/{city} route 308-redirects to the destination — one canonical URL, one SEO signal. Country-level guides keep living at /guide/{country}.

faqItems.q: Are the guides available in English?
faqItems.a: Yes — every published destination has its EN version (/en/destination/{slug}) with native translation by our editorial team (no raw machine translation). hreflang fr-FR / en / x-default emitted on every page.

sections.valueBody: An account centralises your bookings and requests. The monthly Concierge newsletter selects hotels and itineraries the price comparators do not index. When the Prestige tier opens, Club members are contacted first.
sections.freeBody: No payment information is requested. You can leave the programme any time from your account.
sections.transparencyBody: The benefits shown here are the ones we are activating hotel by hotel, as our partners sign the Concierge Club addendum. At booking time, you see exactly what applies to your stay — no sleight of hand.

items.q: It is free — where is the catch?
items.a: There is none. The Club is a relationship tool: we earn your trust and, later, you decide (or not) to upgrade to Prestige. You can delete your account at any time from the dashboard.

items.q: Why do I not see all the benefits on a hotel page?
items.a: Each partner hotel chooses the set of benefits it activates. At programme launch, some hotels will only offer the account-bound benefits; others already activate breakfast and upgrades.

items.q: What changes with Prestige?
items.a: Prestige (€99/year, 30-day free trial) activates the full set of benefits negotiated with our Little partner hotels: breakfast, upgrade, hotel credit, late check-out, welcome gift, 24/7 Concierge WhatsApp.

clubPressKit.lede: You write about luxury hospitality? Here is the press kit for the MyConciergeHotel.com loyalty programme.

sections.identityBody: Le Concierge Club is the loyalty programme of MyConciergeHotel.com, an IATA agency specialising in extraordinary hotels worldwide — Atout France Palaces, Relais & Châteaux, Forbes Five Star, Michelin Keys, Leading Hotels of the World. Two tiers: Le Concierge Club (free, no credit card, no commitment) and Le Concierge Club Prestige (€99/year, 30-day trial, Phase 6 rollout). Phase 1 launch: May 2026.
sections.philosophyBody: No editorial gating: all content stays public and indexable. The member pays for an operational experience (attentions, upgrades, late check-out, WhatsApp Concierge) and, from Phase 6, a negotiated rate below the public price.
sections.numbersBody: 2,193 published hotel pages across 127 countries, including 434 Relais & Châteaux, 197 Small Luxury Hotels, 127 World 50 Best and 18 Atout France Palaces. 290 editorial rankings, 86 destination guides, 20 luxury itineraries (France + international).
sections.complianceBody: Programme compliant with French DGCCRF and EU Digital Services Act requirements. No fabricated urgency indicators (CDC §2.8). Editorial Concierge voice (ADR-0011): sentences ≤ 25 words, sourced vocabulary, no generic superlatives.

faq.q: Who can join Le Concierge Club?
faq.a: Any traveller of legal age with a MyConciergeHotel.com account. Membership is free, immediate, and requires no credit card. One-click unsubscribe from the dashboard.

faq.q: How do you differ from hotel programmes (Marriott Bonvoy, Accor ALL)?
faq.a: Le Concierge Club is not tied to a chain. It stacks with the brand-specific programmes — you do not lose points by booking via us. Our value is editorial (named curation), operational (direct negotiations with Little partner hotels) and tariff-based (Phase 6).

faq.q: Is the member rate real?
faq.a: In Phase 1, the member price equals the public price — we announce it but do not differentiate it until our booking infrastructure is live (Phase 6). Full transparency: we do not hide the public price and we do not show a fictional differential.

faq.q: What is the publisher's legal status?
faq.a: MyConciergeHotel.com is published by TravelBA SAS, IATA / APST agency, Hiscox professional liability insurance. Full legal identity on /en/legal-notice.

faq.q: How can journalists contact you?
faq.a: press@myconciergehotel.com — reply within 48 business hours.

clubPressKit.assetsNote: The visual kit (vector logos, screenshots, argument fact-sheets) is available on request at press@myconciergehotel.com. No image may be redistributed without prior written agreement.
